revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Shinto shrine]] (crud category cleanup) [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24744680692|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!--generated by generate_shikinaisha_pages_v25_with_redirects.py-->
{{Infobox religious building
| name = Hioki Shrine (Nagano City)
| native_name = 日置神社（長野市）
| mapframe = yes
| mapframe-zoom = 15
| mapframe-wikidata = yes
| mapframe-point = none
| map_type = Japan
| map_caption = Hioki Shrine (Nagano City)
| coordinates = {{coord|36.54929|137.974668}}
| map_relief = 1
| religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]]
}}

{{nihongo|'''Hioki Shrine (Nagano City)'''|日置神社（長野市）}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Shinano Province]].

== instance of (P31) ==

* {{ill|Shikinai Ronsha|lt=Shikinai Ronsha|ja|論社|qid=Q135022904|1=Shikinai Ronsha}}
* {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}}
* {{ill|Q845945|ltq=Q845945|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}}
* {{ill|Q134917287|ltq=Q134917287|qid=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}}
* {{ill|Kokuhei-sha|lt=Kokuhei-sha|qid=Q135160342|1=Kokuhei-sha}}

== part of (P361) ==

* {{ill|List of Shikinaisha in Shinano Province|lt=List of Shikinaisha in Shinano Province|ja|信濃国の式内社一覧|qid=Q11386164|1=List of Shikinaisha in Shinano Province}}
** Series ordinal: 14
** P155: {{ill|Q11653682|ltq=Q11653682|qid=Q11653682|1=Hasedera (Nagano)}}
** P156: {{ill|Shimitsuno Shrine|lt=Shimitsuno Shrine|qid=Q135039921|1=Shimitsuno Shrine}}

== located in the administrative territorial entity (P131) ==

* {{ill|Q289250|ltq=Q289250|qid=Q289250|1=Shinano Province}}
* {{ill|Sarashina District, Nagano|lt=Sarashina district|en|Sarashina District, Nagano|ja|更級郡|qid=Q7423207|1=Sarashina District, Nagano}}

== coordinate location (P625) ==

* {{coord|36.54929|137.974668}}

== Kokugakuin University Digital Museum entry ID (P13677) ==

* 181982
** P3831: {{ill|Kokugakuin University Shrine database|lt=Kokugakuin University Shrine database|qid=Q135159299|1=Kokugakuin University Shrine database}}

== country (P17) ==

* {{ill|Q17|ltq=Q17|qid=Q17|1=Japan}}

== said to be the same as (P460) ==

* {{ill|Q135039920|ltq=Q135039920|qid=Q135039920|1=Hiokino Shrine (Q135039920)}}
** P2868: {{ill|Shikinai Ronsha|lt=Shikinai Ronsha|ja|論社|qid=Q135022904|1=Shikinai Ronsha}}
